title: Linguistic leave
notes: Official Luxembourg guidance for linguistic leave; confirms scope, eligible providers, exclusions, and the 200-hour cap.

title: Citizen's pact for intercultural living together - 'Biergerpakt'
notes: Official Luxembourg page for the Biergerpakt programme; confirms eligibility plus the introductory and advanced module structure.

title: Financial aid for in-company continuing vocational training
notes: Official Luxembourg company-training co-funding page; confirms business eligibility, example training types, and the 15%/35% support structure.

title: Learn languages in a pleasant and welcoming environment
notes: Public language-learning and certification institution page; confirms INLL's integration role, 13-language course offering, and recognized certification routes.

title: Courses
notes: Private Luxembourg language-school course catalogue; confirms accredited positioning and broad course formats and languages.

title: Annual Report on Intra-EU Labour Mobility - 2025 edition
notes: European Commission page summarizing the 2025 labour-mobility edition; provides the verified 45.1% cross-border-worker share for Luxembourg.
